## Summary

Project management frontend refactored to nested routing with middleware guards, repository + query data boundaries, and UI-only Zustand state. Added ADR + playbook docs and quality gates for unit/integration/e2e.

## Checklist
- [ ] Documentation updated (`docs/` and ADR if architecture changed)
- [ ] Tests added/updated (unit/integration/e2e as applicable)
- [ ] Accessibility checks completed
- [ ] Visual regression screenshots attached for UI changes
- [ ] CI checks pass (typecheck/test/build/e2e smoke)
